title: geum triflorum var. triflorum
intro: Geum triflorum var. triflorum, also known as Three Aunts or Prairie Smoke, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote health and well-being, and its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. In herbal medicine, Geum triflorum var. triflorum is often used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
